_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7391876499709627417","book_info":{"abstract":"【克苏鲁娘化】【诡异】【异能】
穿越到一个诡异横行的世界，齐迈只想安稳度日。
但不知道为何，他身边的怪异存在总是越聚越多。
好消息：班里的美女转校生【客途露子】，居然是刚搬到他家隔壁的邻居！
坏消息：她衣服底下隐藏着可怖扭曲的黑色触手，手下掌管还有一群鱼人小弟……
更坏的消息：齐迈被她盯上了。
‘我发现邻居似乎是怪物，我该怎么办？急，在线等。’
齐迈刚将求救的信息发出去。
爱穿【黄衣】，现在正在当实习偶像的青梅竹马【韩姒沓】，秒回道。
‘快把我送给你的【黄印】护身符戴在身上，我马上就到！’
在图书馆的结识的三无学姐【尤可】则说：‘我给你的那把【银钥匙】能打开我家的门，你搬到我家，和我一起住吧。’
……
多年后，记者向齐迈提出疑问。
“请问您是如何成为传奇调查员的呢？”
齐迈很是坦诚，直接实话实说。
“三分运气、七分勇气……”
“还有剩下的九十七分靠贵人扶持。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2od6750ad1ebdf518f6cefe10bc6a674d6~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"食堂泼辣椒酱","author_id":"","book_id":"7391876499709627417","book_name":"我的女友是克苏鲁","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":705,"name":"克苏鲁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=705&name=克苏鲁&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7392166714865091097","read_count":"11873","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1027660"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"437","tags":"都市高武,都市,系统,穿越,多女主,都市异能,克苏鲁","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/faab843d351505b47dd1ecaca40af5a6~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779385861&x-signature=Q9Z88bRJ59cEKkGCJU51OWFTZww%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3681619696954926","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"81"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230151018E70239F686A3BEA3D54"}"},"relate
